title: Stabilize map proof browser smoke
goal: Add or repair a deterministic browser-route smoke for the Commonworld MapLibre map proof so T003 can be verified with real DOM-level evidence instead of static validation only.

acceptance.assertion: A committed or repeatable browser smoke opens proofs/map/ and observes renderable markers for exact and approximate seed projects while hidden projects produce no marker.
The smoke does not depend on live CDN or tile provider availability; MapLibre and tile/network dependencies are mocked or otherwise controlled.
COMMONWORLD-ATLAS-V1-T003 can be verified after this smoke passes without weakening the no-backend/no-write-path boundary.

metadata.source_attempt: A local Playwright smoke was attempted on 2026-07-08 but failed before page load because the installed Playwright Node driver crashed with a V8 SetPermissions failure.
metadata.boundary: Do not add backend, submissions, accounts or weltgewebe write coupling; this is only a deterministic proof-route smoke.

verified_acceptance.browser-smoke: PR #34 adds scripts/smoke_map_proof_offline.py, which emits exact/approximate marker evidence and skipped hidden-project evidence from committed proof files and seed data.
verified_acceptance.external-dependency-control: PR #34 smoke is network_mode=offline-stubbed and stubs maplibre-gl plus carto-raster-tiles instead of fetching live dependencies.
verified_acceptance.t003-verification-path: PR #34 is wired into make validate and provides the missing smoke evidence needed to verify T003 without weakening the no-backend/no-write-path boundary.

validation: GitHub validate workflow succeeded for PR #34.
Local validation before merge: python3 scripts/smoke_map_proof_offline.py; make validate.
